description: Set up a VFX shot integration in Houdini. A scene at '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/integration_base.hipnc' has a Stanford Bunny model and Venice Sunset HDRI already loaded. Configure the scene for photorealistic plate integration: (1) Create a ground plane with a shadow catcher/matte material that receives shadows but is transparent in the final render, (2) Assign a reflective chrome material to the bunny, (3) Set up Mantra rendering with separate object and shadow passes to '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/renders/integration/', (4) Build a COP2 compositing network that combines the object render over a background plate image at '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/data/bg_plate.jpg' with the shadow pass multiplied underneath, (5) Render the final composite to '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/renders/integration/final_comp.exr'. Save as '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/vfx_integration.hipnc'.
